question: Will the price of Bitcoin be above $70,000 on April 20?

fragility_points: A sharp macro or crypto-specific selloff could erase the current cushion quickly.

key_assumptions: No major shock pushes Binance BTCUSDT down more than roughly 6% before noon ET on April 20.

Recent occupancy above 70000 is more informative than isolated downside excursions in late March.

Current Binance spot is materially above 70000, so the outside-view baseline favors Yes.
Crypto short-horizon volatility and exact-minute settlement keep the probability meaningfully below the market's mid-80s pricing.
payload.main_thesis: Yes is more likely than No because BTC is already materially above 70000 on Binance, but the market is somewhat too confident given five-day crypto volatility and exact-minute settlement risk.
quote_anchors: This market will resolve to 'Yes' if the Binance 1 minute candle for BTC/USDT 12:00 in the ET timezone (noon) on the date specified in the title has a final 'Close' price higher than the price specified in the title.

unresolved_ambiguities: Practical fallback handling if Binance UI and API representations were briefly inconsistent.
